// purpose: Type-checks the @flatppl/web gallery shell. esbuild stays the build
// rationale: pipeline (it strips types per-file in build.mjs); tsc here is a
//: lint-only step run via `npm run typecheck`.
// note: The src/*.ts files are loaded as plain <script> tags (NOT modules)
// note2: and share globals via window.FlatPPLWeb*. No ES module graph; each
// note3: file is its own IIFE. tsc treats them as scripts (no top-level
// note4: imports/exports needed) and uses src/globals.d.ts for the shared
